auth_info: Complete SSO login in the browser. Credentials will be extracted automatically.
msg_browser_login_hint: Complete SSO login in the opened browser window.
msg_engine_ready: Engine Ready (Account: {0}), go to Monitor tab
msg_goto_auth: Please complete login on the [Authentication] page first.
msg_invalid_interval: Interval must be a non-negative integer. Reset to default 5 sec.
msg_time_parse_error: Time format parse failed. Starting immediately.
msg_success: All requests completed. Course registration successful!
msg_consecutive_timeouts: {0} consecutive timeouts! Server may be down. Cooling down {1}s...
log_already_registered: API >> Duplicate registration detected, likely already enrolled: {0}
log_read_timeout: API >> Registration timeout (data sent, pending confirmation)
log_send_confirm: API >> Sending final confirmation (may take a while)...
log_confirm_timeout: API >> Confirmation timeout, but likely processed on server.
msg_attack_locked: Seats locked! Final confirmation not received. Check your schedule directly.
log_non_json_response: API >> Server returned non-JSON response (session may have expired or login page)
log_unknown_response: API >> Unknown response format, please check schedule manually: {0}
msg_unknown_response: System returned unknown response format, please check manually
err_not_on_page: Not on course selection page. Please confirm login.
err_no_student_id: Credential extraction failed: Student ID not found in browser cache
err_browser_disconnected: Browser disconnected (may have been closed manually). Please restart and login again.
err_browser_disconnected_cookies: Browser disconnected, cannot read cookies. Please login again.
err_browser_disconnected_script: Browser disconnected, cannot execute script. Please login again.
about_warn1: Disclaimer: For Python automation & reverse engineering educational purposes only. Do not use for commercial profit.
about_warn2: High-frequency requests may trigger account restrictions. Set reasonable intervals.
msg_lang_restart: Please restart the application to apply the language setting.
